nameMeanings.name: Cressett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Derry): perhaps from Gaelic crosaid ‘little cross’. If so, it is likely to be a variant of Crossan . Compare the pair Corbett and Corban .

variants.name: Crossan
meanings: Irish (Donegal): shortened form of McCrossen , an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Chrosáin ‘son of the satirist’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Cressett was born about 1330, in Upton Cressett, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Cressett, was 32 and his mother, Mrs. William Cressett, was 32. He married Constance de Upton about 1350, in Upton Cressett, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1370, in Upton Cressett, Shropshire, England, at the age of 41.

Il a épousé Constance de Upton environ 1350, à Upton Cressett, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Cressett(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 업턴 크레싯에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Cressett(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. William Cressett(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 업턴 크레싯에서 Constance de Upton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1370년 영국 슈럽실르 업턴 크레싯에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.
